targets.why: Fail-safe safety-floor metric: denominator is the PRE-REGISTERED tagged count (not the supplied rubric); a tagged id missing from the rubric must count AGAINST recall and surface in missing_from_rubric. Non-obvious fail-safe contract that a reader would get wrong.
Core faithfulness metric — verified material atoms / material atoms; the material-only filtering and None-on-empty-denominator semantics are load-bearing and undocumented.
Verified-AND-resolved-citation over material atoms; distinct from faithfulness_precision (adds citation resolution requirement). The distinction is non-obvious.
Rubric coverage recall with pending=True sentinel when no rubric — the pending vs zero distinction is a fail-safe that must not read as a false 0.
Contract-draft rejection state transition; enforces LAW II (non-empty rationale for the SOC2 audit trail) and raises ContractDraftStateError. Safety-gated state mutation.

Guarded running->completed transition: conditional UPDATE only fires WHERE status='running', raises JobQueueError on unknown job or wrong-state. The guard semantics (rowcount==0 disambiguation) are non-obvious.
Guarded running->failed transition mirroring mark_completed; same rowcount-based state guard and error contract.

Intervention-recognizer scan: returns first regex match that passes min-token-length AND exclude-word filters — the filtering that distinguishes it from a raw re.search is the whole point and is undocumented.
Out-of-scope refusal gate for follow-ups: keyword-overlap threshold against parent template, with 'general' template short-circuit. Decides refusal — safety-relevant and non-obvious.

Adequacy gate verdict object exposing BOTH raw-pool and on-topic denominators so Methods cannot claim '8/8 grounded' over a contaminated pool. The dual-denominator disclosure invariant is subtle and load-bearing.
Per-check adequacy finding with severity in {ok,warn,critical}; the severity ladder drives gate decisions and the enum values are only in a trailing comment.
Plan-sufficiency gate verdict carrying authority_floor, per-facet minimums, round/max_rounds, and under-covered units — the fields that decide whether another retrieval round fires.
Winner-firing gate verdict; abort=True means the run MUST stop before generation. winners_checked is a disclosure manifest, never a drop list — a distinction a reader would miss.

Post-fetch eligibility outcome: excluded-ids MASK the citable menu (rows KEPT in corpus+disclosure), a demote-weight map for SOFT order-not-drop preferences, plus receipts. The keep-but-mask vs drop semantics are non-obvious.

Top-level ResearchExecutionPlan deserializer — the state schema entrypoint. Validates dict shape, defaults plan_version, and recursively builds every sub-structure while silently dropping non-dict entries.

EligibilityPlan.is_empty short-circuit — deliberately ignores excluded_records (only excluded_ids/weights/receipts count as non-empty). The asymmetry is a real seam-inertness contract, easy to misread.
Maps an evidence id back to its bibliography entry for audit-IR provenance; the id->source resolution is part of the evidence traceability contract.
Surfaces recorded contradictions for a given evidence id — feeds the contradiction-disclosure path; not a trivial getter (cross-references contradiction store).
Claim->evidence-span resolution underpinning span-level faithfulness verification; the claim-to-span join is the traceability primitive.
Source-tier histogram used by tier-compliance gates; the tier taxonomy meaning is non-obvious to a reader.
Computes framing-stance shift between input and output to detect sycophantic drift; the delta definition drives an anti-sycophancy safety signal.
Anti-sycophancy verdict object; fields encode the stance-drift signal consumed downstream.
Junk/low-authority detection verdict feeding source-eligibility filtering; the fields determine whether a source is dropped.
Acceptance gate for auto-induced keywords — the precision/coverage thresholds it enforces decide whether an induced ruleset is admitted.
Maps an OpenAlex source to a POLARIS authority tier; the tier assignment logic feeds every tier-compliance gate and is non-obvious.
Result object for the 'lethal' retrieval path; 26-line dataclass whose fields carry the retrieval provenance consumed by compose. Non-trivial shape.
Composition output object carrying the composed claim graph + provenance; downstream serialization depends on its field contract.
57-line claim-insertion mutation into the mesh store; establishes claim identity + edges. The persistence/identity contract is non-obvious.
Aggregates per-workspace mesh statistics (claims/questions/answers/ops); the counted entities and their meaning aid reviewers.
Live-judge verdict object; the fields carry the pass/fail signal and rationale used to gate outputs.
LLM scope classifier entrypoint (74 lines) deciding in/out-of-scope routing; the classification contract and fallback behavior are load-bearing for scope enforcement.
BFS over the claim-support graph to determine minimal necessary source set; the traversal + termination semantics are non-obvious and drive source-necessity pruning.
Compliance-count aggregation feeding the contract-compliance gate verdict; the tallied categories are non-obvious from the signature.
Resolves the primary model used by the span-quality gate (env-driven); non-obvious because it selects the judge model that gates generated spans.
Resolves the escalation model the span-quality gate falls back to on disagreement; the escalation semantics (when it fires) are the whole point.

result.baseline: 16738 tests collected, 11 errors (via: /home/polaris/pipeline-env/bin/python -m pytest tests/ --collect-only -q | tail -1, run in /home/polaris/wt/phase3ab4 AFTER copying the phase0 oracle harness). Note: pre-harness collection was 16726 tests / 11 errors; the oracle harness adds 12 collected tests. The 11 errors are pre-existing on branch chore/review-readiness-phase3a-b3 and unrelated to this batch.
